Build information

dev
A A

A focused Spanish verb trainer built for daily practice.

  • 500 ranked Spanish verbs with searchable conjugation tables
  • Core Spanish tenses — presente, pretérito, imperfecto, futuro, condicional, subjuntivo, imperativo
  • Smart drills and flexible verb filtering
  • Voice dictation with instant feedback 🎤
  • Text-to-speech pronunciation 🔊
  • Full conjugation tables for every verb 📖
  • Usage nuggets for common verbs and phrases
  • Offline support (PWA)

Progress and settings save automatically.

Spanish Verb Mnemonics & Tips

-AR Verbs Mnemonic

Mnemonic: o, as, a, amos, ais, an

Rhyme: “Yo -o, tú -as, él -a... nosotros -amos, vosotros -áis, ellos -an.”

Example: hablar → yo hablo, tú hablas, él habla, nosotros hablamos...

-ER Verbs Mnemonic

Mnemonic: o, es, e, emos, eis, en

Phrase: “Yo -o, tú -es, él -e... nosotros -emos, vosotros -éis, ellos -en.”

Example: comer → yo como, tú comes, él come, nosotros comemos...

-IR Verbs Mnemonic

Mnemonic: o, es, e, imos, is, en

Note: Present-tense -ir verbs look like -er verbs except for nosotros and vosotros.

Example: vivir → yo vivo, tú vives, él vive, nosotros vivimos...

Stem-Changing Verbs

Mnemonic: Think of a boot shape covering forms: yo, tú, él/ella/usted, ellos/ellas/ustedes

Rule: Stem changes usually happen inside the boot, but not for nosotros and vosotros.

Example: pensar → pienso, piensas, piensa, pensamos, pensáis, piensan

Quick Help

  • Tap almost anywhere to reveal the answer, then tap again to move on.
  • Use Settings to choose which tenses and which verb ranges are in play. If you are starting out, use Top 50 verbs with the most common tenses.
  • Hear plays the prompt before reveal and the answer after reveal. Say lets you answer aloud and get dictation feedback.
  • Usage shows or hides the example lines while you drill. Most Spanish text is playable, including usages and verb details.
  • Search opens any verb and its full conjugation table.
